summary: We are in full execution mode for the China Going-Global report with IE, launching Asia Start and Intelligent China programs, and finalizing the knowledge website redesign, while urgently needing to close the social media agency selection and Tech in Asia partnership this week.
summaryDetail: The top priority is the joint CKGSB-IE report 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global', targeting a September launch at Tech in Asia or Tyson events in Singapore. Felix needs to confirm the venue and finalize the one-pager proposal this week, while Julie reaches out to President Santiago for an op-ed and Meng identifies alumni case studies. Translation is capped at 50% of the original Chinese content. Simultaneously, the Asia Start November campaign is launching with two parallel routes (AI and traditional) to test performance, and the Intelligent China program website must be completed to start SCM campaigns. The knowledge website redesign is in review with feedback due from Joseph and Julie on Joker's and Joseph's designs. Urgently, the social media agency selection must be expedited—Media Minds is the likely choice—and the Tech in Asia partnership paperwork needs to be finalized within July. On the SEO front, we are prioritizing Asia Star and Intelligent China over US partnerships, with Joseph drafting target keywords and audience profiles. Upcoming: the Shun Tian Shu press release needs to incorporate 10 points or convert to a 10-point article, and the CKGSB-EuroCham EV event collaboration is being set up with Prof Li Wei.

meetings.title: Marketing Team Meeting
meetings.summary: Discussion about worship and visiting a three-story hall.

meetings.title: Knowledge Website Redesign Review
meetings.summary: Team reviewed Joker's knowledge website redesign, noting it's similar to current site with menu improvements. Discussed incorporating ideas from Joseph's more editorial layout to show more articles and indices.

meetings.title: SEO & Program Prioritization Strategy
meetings.summary: Team discusses SEO strategy to rank for AI, EVs, and smart manufacturing programs in China, prioritizing Asia Star and Intelligent China programs over US partnerships.

meetings.title: Marketing Team Meeting - June 29, 2026
meetings.summary: Team reviewed brochure updates, social media agency search, and IE report translation. Discussed feedback on Shun Tian Shu press release and Zhu Yang's excessive ChatGPT-generated comments.

meetings.title: New Chinese Playbook Report Planning
meetings.summary: Team discusses joint report between CKGSB and IE on Chinese companies globalizing to Southeast Asia, with launch at Tech in Asia or Tyson events in Singapore in September. Report will include research from Professor Leeway, op-eds from leadership, and industry case studies.

meetings.title: Asia Start & New Program Planning
meetings.summary: Reviewed campaign results and discussed the Asia Start November campaign with two routes (AI vs traditional). Introduced a new 'Intelligent China' program with modules in Beijing, Shanghai/Hangzhou, and Shenzhen, targeting foreigners.

meetings.title: EU-China Cooperation Discussion
meetings.summary: Discussion on EU-China relations, focusing on geopolitical tensions, de-risking, and the role of companies versus governments in shaping cooperation.

decisions.text: Remove dedicated video section; videos will be dispersed by topic.
Keep knowledge menu centered (preferred over left alignment).
Include indices (BCI, BSI) on knowledge homepage.
Show more articles on homepage, with pinned article at top left and latest articles below.
Prioritize Asia Star and Intelligent China programs over US partnerships for initial SEO and marketing focus.
Include Berkeley program as a third priority, but with lesser emphasis during audit phase.
Only one press release for Shun Tian Shu, either incorporating 10 points or converting to 10-point article.
Media Minds is likely the best agency choice given budget constraints and time.
IE report translation should not exceed 50% of original Chinese content.
Report will be jointly published by CKGSB and IE, jointly distributed.
Working title: 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global'.
Report to be ready by early September for Singapore events.
Report will include main research from Professor Leeway, op-eds from leadership, and industry case studies.
Asia Start November campaign will run two parallel routes for the first month: AI-driven (Joseph) and traditional (Daisy).
Intelligent China program will be marketed as a deeper dive compared to Asia Start to avoid cannibalization.
Finalize partnership with Tech in Asia within July to allow time for planning and recruitment
decisions.meetingTitle: Re: 答复: CKGSB X Tech In ASIA

decisions.text: Proceed with second round of social media ad agency bidding with supplementary materials
decisions.meetingTitle: 海外社媒广告供应商-二轮提报-方案材料补充

Global Marcom's report finalized and sent to Shouhuo
Proceed with CKGSB-EuroCham event collaboration on EV and invite Prof Li Wei
